title: API Method to Connect Boards
excerpt:
Currently, monday API does not support the ability to connect boards directly. We propose the addition of a new method within the API that allows for connecting boards. 
Link to documentation: Connect boards

posts.author: aleonmartinez (Angela Leon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently, monday API does not support the ability to connect boards directly. We propose the addition of a new method within the API that allows for connecting boards.
Link to documentation: Connect boards

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @aleonmartinez, and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Just to be sure, what you are referring to is the ability to create a column of type “connect boards” and then use it to connect two boards all of this, via the API. Correct?

posts.author: aleonmartinez (Angela Leon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Mathias,

Thank you for the warm welcome!

Yes, that is what I’m referring to! Is there any other way to create these connections that don’t require the API?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @aleonmartinez,

Thank you for the confirmation! You are correct. It needs to be done manually (the creation of the board and the connection itself).

Thank you for the feature request!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
To add to this request - the ability to add/remove boards from a connect board column that exists should be included, as well as change the mapping of mirror columns for specific boards.

I’m not trying to pile on, just adding the connection by API but leaving configuring mirror columns up to the end user seems a bit of a dead end.

posts.author: Izzy (Israel Benson)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we integrate Whatsapp to import all incoming messages and requests but be tagged back to an Item or Board?. @anon29275264

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello there @Izzy, please open a new topic for that question or fill this form so we can tackle said question there and not in this unrelated topic
